goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'bishops stortford' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
